---
title: "Ben Quilligan"
image: profilepic.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 200px
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/benquilligan/
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:benquilligan1@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ben-quilligan
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< fa file-pdf >}} CV"
      href: /benquilligan.github.ie/BenQuilliganCV.pdf
      target: _blank
---

## Welcome

I am a final-year Business Studies student at Dublin City University, specialising in Data Analytics. During this course I have developed strong critical thinking and problem-solving skills which I hope to put to use in a future career in analytics.

Here you can learn more about me and some of the projects I have completed throughout the duration of this course.

::: {.callout-note}
This site is my ePortfolio, showcasing academic projects, certifications, and professional experience built during my degree at DCU.
:::

## Quick Links

| Section | Description |
|---|---|
| [About Me](about.qmd) | Background, skills, and goals |
| [Projects](projects/index.qmd) | Academic work with Python code |
| [Certifications](certifications.qmd) | Kubicle and DataCamp credentials |
| [CV](BenQuilliganCV.pdf) | Full curriculum vitae (PDF) |
| [Reflection](reflection.qmd) | What I learned throughout this module |
